productName: Canna Organix Infused Pre-roll Headshots - Donny Tsunami - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Donny Tsunami flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
